texto: Many of my readers are women and some of them email me their thoughts about the stories I’ve written. Almost all of them find a delicious pleasure in being totally frightened by the strange and dark side of life. Perhaps it’s because horror books are an escape from our sometimes-mundane lives? Or could it be that many of us actually do have a private darker side that we like to explore secretly through books, movies and music?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sara Brooke: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Many of my readers are women and some of them email me their thoughts about the stories I’ve writ…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, fear, horror pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e horror.
